subject: Elder robed figure (Jaya Ballard) blasting fire point-blank at an armored opponent
description: An elder female figure in red and brown robes, wearing round goggles, fires a burst of flame directly into the torso of a blue-armored opponent at close range. The opponent is knocked back by the impact, their weapon arm raised high. The explosion of fire and light fills the center of the composition. The setting is an open sky with light blue tones. The elder figure smirks with confidence, hand extended and pointing. The contrast between the warm fire blast and the cool blue armor of the opponent is stark.
foreground: Elder robed figure firing fire magic into an armored opponent, both in close contact
background: Open sky, light blue tones, implied outdoor setting
emotion: Elder figure smirks with confident amusement; opponent is staggered and reeling
